reasoning.typography: Generic Open Sans system font with no character or discipline—pure default stencil
reasoning.hierarchy: Everything is the same weight/size—name, dates, post titles all blend together with no focal point
reasoning.distinctiveness: Completely interchangeable personal blog template—swap the name for anyone else and it works identically
reasoning.color: Restrained black/white/subtle gray palette shows discipline, though there's zero accent or personality
reasoning.density: Excessive whitespace everywhere with timid centered content creates a floaty, unconfident layout
reasoning.voice: Blog stencil IA: 'Recent posts' chronological list with zero editorial voice or curation showing actual interests

winning_patterns: Restrained monochrome palette avoids decorative color abuse
Social icons cleanly integrated without dominating
Clean typography hierarchy in post list (date, title separation)
anti_patterns: Default Jekyll theme with zero customization or personality
Timid centered layout drowning in whitespace—no confident density
Generic 'Recent posts' blog stencil reveals nothing about the person
Open Sans is the Comic Sans of personal sites in 2024
Post titles are technical jargon with no narrative framing
No visual hierarchy—name same weight as everything else
